summary: Unified Pricing Policy Engine feature testing complete. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Settings Hub Pricing Policy tab verified with 5 tiers displayed, editable fields, and live preview working correctly. safeDisplay utility confirmed imported in all 7 specified admin pages.
critical_code_review_comments: commission_margin_engine_service.py: Correctly implements referral overrides affiliate rule (line 119-122)
commission_margin_engine_service.py: Hard validation for split > 100% (line 104-111) and allocation > distributable pool (line 142-146)
commission_margin_engine_routes.py: PUT validation correctly rejects invalid tiers (lines 127-151)
settings_resolver.py: get_pricing_policy_tiers() returns unified tiers from Settings Hub (line 462-465)
AdminSettingsHubPage.jsx: PricingPolicyTab component has proper data-testid attributes for all tier fields
safeDisplay.js: Properly exported and imported in OrdersPage, PaymentsQueuePage, InvoicesPage, QuotesPage, CRMPageV2, customer/InvoicesPageV2, vendor/VendorBulkImportPage
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Pricing Policy Engine fully tested. Backend APIs at /api/commission-engine/* all working: pricing-policy-tiers (GET/PUT), preview, calculate-order, validate-wallet, validate-tier-config. Frontend Settings Hub Pricing Policy tab at /admin/settings-hub displays 5 Tanzania-default tiers with editable fields and live preview. safeDisplay utility applied globally across admin tables.

backend_apis.GET /api/commission-engine/pricing-polic: Returns 5 Tanzania-default tiers with correct structure
backend_apis.POST /api/commission-engine/preview: Correctly calculates economics for base_cost=3000000 (Tier 4: 20% margin, 14% protected, 6% distributable)
backend_apis.PUT /api/commission-engine/pricing-polic: Rejects tiers where split percentages exceed 100%
Rejects tiers where protected + distributable exceeds total_margin
backend_apis.POST /api/commission-engine/calculate-or: Calculates correct totals for multi-item order across different tiers
backend_apis.POST /api/commission-engine/validate-wal: Caps wallet at distributable pool (wallet cannot consume base cost or protected margin)

frontend_ui.Settings Hub Pricing Policy tab: Loads and displays 5 tiers with editable fields (label, min/max amount, margins, distribution split)
frontend_ui.Live preview: Shows correct calculations for base_cost input (tier resolution, selling price, distributable pool, allocations)

safeDisplay_usage.OrdersPage.jsx: safeDisplay, safeMoney, cellClass imported and used
safeDisplay_usage.PaymentsQueuePage.jsx: safeDisplay, safeMoney, cellClass imported and used
